next_steps: Perform bronchoalveolar lavage with fungal smear and culture, PJP direct fluorescent antibody staining, and viral PCRs
Send stool for Strongyloides stercoralis larva testing
Obtain skin biopsy of purpuric rash for histopathology and tissue culture
Perform abdominal CT scan with intravenous contrast to assess for bowel ischemia or perforation
Initiate empiric ivermectin coverage for potential Strongyloides hyperinfection
Monitor serial blood cultures and fungal serum antigens including Histoplasma
Optimize mechanical ventilation settings and hemodynamic support
